title: Graph Neural Networks for Knowledge Graph Completion
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach using graph neural networks to complete missing links in knowledge graphs. We demonstrate significant improvements over traditional embedding methods.
authors: Smith, J.; Johnson, A.; Brown, M.

title: Hybrid RAG Systems: Combining Structured and Semantic Search
abstract: We propose a hybrid retrieval-augmented generation system that combines structured database queries with semantic vector search for improved question answering.
authors: Davis, L.; Wilson, K.; Taylor, R.

title: Multi-Tenant Graph Databases: Security and Performance
abstract: This work addresses security and performance challenges in multi-tenant graph database systems, proposing novel isolation mechanisms.
authors: Anderson, P.; Garcia, M.; Lee, S.

title: Large Language Models for Scientific Literature Review
abstract: We explore the application of large language models for automated scientific literature review and knowledge synthesis.
authors: Thompson, E.; Martinez, C.; White, D.

title: Vector Embeddings in Knowledge Graph Construction
abstract: This paper investigates the role of vector embeddings in automated knowledge graph construction from unstructured text.
authors: Clark, R.; Lewis, J.; Hall, N.
